message:
Expand symbol latency baseline with comprehensive measurement data

Massive expansion of the symbol latency baseline dataset from ~7K to
~173K data points, providing significantly higher statistical
confidence for latency regression detection. Updated test harness
with minor adjustments and added new sample log for traceability.

- tests/conformance/symbol_latency_baseline.v1.json: expanded from
  ~7,424 to ~173,125 latency measurements across all tracked symbols
- tests/conformance/symbol_latency_samples.v1.log: new sample log
  with 10 representative measurement entries
- crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/symbol_latency_baseline_test.rs:
  minor test adjustments for expanded dataset

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
